params.name: text
params.description: Visible link label. Keep it short and action-led.

params.name: href
params.description: Destination URL or fragment for the link action.

params.name: openInNewWindow
params.description: If `true`, opens the link in a new tab and adds `target="_blank"` plus `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.

params.name: classes
params.description: Extra classes applied to the anchor element. Use for layout or integration hooks rather than changing the component pattern.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the anchor element, for example `data-*` or `aria-*` attributes.
